subcodes.first_line: O beloved of the hearts of those who yearn! Two letters from your honoured self, dated two days ago, the twenty-sixth of Dhi'l-Qa'dah, the sacred month [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب قلوب مشتاقان دو مراسله آنجناب دو یوم قبل که بیست ششم ذی القعده الحرام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @petitions to authorities, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
